Event: Magic Training - Pterobot
Event Date: 21/11/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: AR41
Pterobot Tamer Plate Mail

Once in a while, the unit activates their inner power for 5 sec. During this time, the unit takes 65% less magic damage and when attacking, removes 2 random debuffs and increases own health and physical armor by 20% for 4 sec. Stacks up to 4 times.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
